since_last: 36% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.90%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC -1.10% · Gold +2.21% · Nasdaq100 -0.32%. 36% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.90%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.90%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +22.08%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +22.08%, DELL +9.15%, CBRS +5.07%, HPE +4.99%, NRG +4.05%. Laggards: PATH -9.09%, GEV -7.44%, APP -4.23%, PLTR -4.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.42% at $121.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
